title: mentha pulegium var. gibraltarica
intro: Mentha pulegium var. gibraltarica, also known as Rock Mint or Gibraltar Pennyroyal, is a variant of the common pennyroyal plant native to the Iberian Peninsula and the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils, which have antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Mentha pulegium var. gibraltarica include relief from digestive issues, menstrual cramps, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate headaches. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and essential oil infusions, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
